description: Composition Cream T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round neck with contrast collar, and graphic print on the front Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash cold Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print/embroidery Enliven your weekends by spreading the message of peace in style with this T-shirt from belmonte. The graphic print screams out in style, spreading the message to stay away from peace-harming gadgets, and the cotton fabric is sure to keep you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or bermudas for a failsafe weekend look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
